title: Exceptional luxury experience!
review: The room was absolutely spotless with beautiful views of the garden. Staff was incredibly attentive and the spa treatment was world-class. Breakfast buffet had excellent variety. Would definitely recommend for a relaxing getaway.

title: Good but room for improvement
review: Check-in took way too long, waited almost 40 minutes. Room was nice once we got there but AC wasn't working properly. Restaurant food was good though. Location is excellent.
responseText: Thank you for your feedback, Sarah. We sincerely apologize for the check-in delay and AC issues. We're addressing these with our team.

title: Perfect business trip stay
review: Everything was flawless. Fast WiFi, quiet room, excellent concierge service. The business center facilities were top-notch. Room service was prompt and food quality was exceptional. Will be my go-to hotel for Chennai visits.

title: Disappointing experience
review: Very disappointed. Room wasn't ready at check-in time despite early notification. Bathroom had cleanliness issues. Staff seemed overwhelmed and unresponsive to our requests. Pool was under maintenance without prior notice.

title: Great value for money
review: Solid stay overall. Room was comfortable and clean. Breakfast could have more options but what was available was fresh. Staff were friendly. Good location near the business district.
responseText: Thank you Michael! We appreciate your feedback and are expanding our breakfast menu soon.

title: Beautiful anniversary celebration
review: Celebrated our anniversary here and the hotel made it so special! Room was decorated beautifully, complimentary champagne, and the rooftop dinner was romantic. The spa couple's treatment was divine. Thank you for the memories!

title: Mixed feelings
review: Room was okay but smaller than photos suggested. Bed was comfortable. WiFi kept dropping which was frustrating for remote work. Gym was well-equipped though. Checkout was smooth.

title: Pleasant surprise
review: Exceeded my expectations! The heritage architecture is stunning. Room had all modern amenities while retaining classic charm. Courtyard dining was a highlight. Only minor issue was slow elevator.
responseText: Thank you Ananya! We're glad you enjoyed our heritage property. We're looking into the elevator speed.

title: Terrible service
review: Worst hotel experience. Lost our luggage, took 4 hours to find it. Room smelled of smoke despite booking non-smoking. Noise from construction started at 7am. Asked for manager, never came. Never again.

title: Luxury at its finest
review: Absolutely loved every moment. The Presidential Suite was breathtaking. Butler service was impeccable. Pool area was serene. Fine dining restaurant deserves a Michelin star. Perfect for special occasions.

title: Reliable for business
review: Third time staying here for work. Consistency is their strength. Always clean, always professional. Conference rooms are well-equipped. Would appreciate better gym hours though.
responseText: Thank you for your loyalty, Vikram! We're extending gym hours starting next month.

title: Good but expensive
review: Hotel is nice but feels overpriced for what you get. Room was standard, nothing special. F&B prices are steep. Location and pool save the experience. Would return if rates were more competitive.

title: Hidden gem!
review: What a discovery! The attention to detail is remarkable. From the welcome drink to the turndown service, everything was thoughtful. The garden cafe has the best filter coffee. Staff remembered my name throughout stay!

title: Family friendly
review: Traveled with kids and hotel was very accommodating. Kids club kept them entertained. Family room was spacious. Babysitting service was reliable. Only downside was limited kids menu options.
responseText: Thank you Nancy! We're adding more kids menu options based on feedback like yours.

title: Not worth the premium
review: Expected more from a 5-star property. Room service took an hour. Valet scratched my car. Front desk couldn't handle a simple room change request. The only positives were the bed quality and location.
